result.stdout:
Description:
  nuget-warden - scans for blocked NuGet packages in project files

Usage:
  NugetWarden [options]

Options:
  --config <config>            Path to the blocked-packages.yaml file [default: blocked-packages.yaml]
  --project-dir <project-dir>  Directory to scan for .csproj files [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-nugetw-1df7c7c0-39bcdffe]
  --mode <central|direct>      Scan mode: 'direct' for .csproj PackageReference, 'central' for Directory.Packages.props [default: direct]
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
